summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Risk Management Engine, Backtesting Tab, and Alerts Tab. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI features verified working correctly with real data persistence.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when Alpaca API keys are invalid - pre-existing issue, gracefully handled in UI with 'Connect Alpaca account to view daily risk status' message

passed_tests: Risk Management - Position Size Calculator works correctly (25 shares, $2,500 position, 10% allocation, $125 risk)
Risk Management - Risk/Reward Calculator works correctly (1:3.0 ratio, 'Excellent' quality)
Risk Management - Settings persist via API (verified max_position_size=8%, max_daily_loss=3%)
Risk Management - Daily Risk Status gracefully handles Alpaca 401 errors
Backtesting - Strategy selection UI works (5 strategies: Momentum, Mean Reversion, Breakout, MA Crossover, Value)
Backtesting - Run backtest with real historical data (AAPL momentum 1y)
Backtesting - Results display: Total Return (-13.61%), Final Value ($8,639.42), Max Drawdown (-19.39%), Sharpe Ratio (-2.04)
Backtesting - Equity curve displays correctly with date range
Backtesting - Trade log displays (10 recent trades with entry/exit dates and P&L)
Backtesting - History panel shows recent backtests
Alerts - Create alert persists to database (TSLA Price Above $300)
Alerts - Delete alert works (verified with toast 'Alert deleted')
Alerts - Toggle enable/disable works (switch component functional)
Alerts - Check Now verifies against real prices (TSLA triggered at $361.83)
Alerts - Alert history displays triggered alerts with timestamps
Alerts - Reset triggered alert functionality available
API - Position size calculation with invalid stop loss returns error
API - Risk/Reward calculator returns correct quality ratings (Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor)
API - Backtest history endpoint returns recent backtests
API - Alert types endpoint returns 4 types (price_above, price_below, change_pct, volume_spike)
API - Full alert workflow: create -> check -> trigger -> reset -> delete
critical_code_review_comments: All three new features (Risk Management, Backtesting, Alerts) are fully functional with real data persistence
FMP API integration working correctly for historical data and real-time price checks
MongoDB persistence verified for risk settings, backtest history, and alerts
UI components properly display calculation results and backtest metrics
Error handling graceful for Alpaca 401 (invalid keys) - shows appropriate message instead of crashing
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses real-time financial data from FMP API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Management, Backtesting, and Alerts features fully tested and working. Position Size Calculator calculates shares based on risk parameters. Risk/Reward Calculator provides quality ratings. Backtesting runs with real FMP historical data and displays comprehensive results including equity curve and trade log. Alerts system supports 4 alert types, persists to MongoDB, checks against real-time prices, and maintains trigger history. Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) but this is gracefully handled in the UI.

daily_risk_status.alpaca_integration: Returns graceful message when Alpaca keys invalid

backtesting.equity_curve: Visual bar chart with date range
backtesting.trade_log: Last 10 trades with entry/exit dates and P&L

alerts.check_now: Verifies alerts against real-time FMP prices
alerts.trigger_detection: Marks alerts as triggered with message and timestamp
alerts.history: Maintains log of all triggered alerts
